Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend A Deposition And Provide Answers To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents ; And For Sanctions; Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Jul-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA YELLOW CAB's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend A Deposition And Provide Answers To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond and to appear for his deposition were a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to the Form Interrogatories and Request For Production Of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is further ordered to appear for his deposition on a date to be noticed by Defendant and to be completed no later than August 9, 2010. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $510, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
